code:
import io
import string

fn is_ws(_ b: Int) -> Bool
  b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13 or b == 11 or b == 12
end

fn main() -> Unit
  let text = io.read_to_end()
  let n = string.len(text)
  mut i = 0
  mut tok = ""
  mut sum = 0
  mut count = 0
  while i < n
    match string.byte_at(text, i)
    when Some(b)
      if is_ws(b)
        if not string.is_empty(tok)
          match string.parse_int(tok)
          when Some(v)
            sum = sum + v
            count = count + 1
          when None
            ()
          end
          tok = ""
        end
      else
        tok = "#{tok}#{string.from_byte(b)}"
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  if not string.is_empty(tok)
    match string.parse_int(tok)
    when Some(v)
      sum = sum + v
      count = count + 1
    when None
      ()
    end
  end
  if count == 0
    print("avg=0")
  else
    let avg = sum / count
    print("avg=#{avg}")
  end
end
